ValidationRule.description: Complexity - only David and Raz can edit this field
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' , NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'david.kaplansky@similarweb.com')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'raz.karmi@similarweb.com')), ISCHANGED( Complexity__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Raz Karmi or David Kaplansky can edit this feild.
